questionHtml: Explain why a colorimeter set at a wavelength of 500 nm is not suitable to investigate reactions of Zn2+ compounds. Use section 3 of the data booklet.
markschemeHtml:
Zn2+ does not form coloured compounds/ has a complete d subshell/orbital  ✓

500 nm/«the setting on the colorimeter» in visible region AND no absorbance will be seen  ✓

meta.title: Explain why a colorimeter set at a wavelength of 500 nm is not suitable to investigate reactions of Zn2+ compounds. Use section 3 of the data booklet.
breadcrumbLabels: 14.1 Covalent bonding and electron domain and molecular geometries
